title: What happens when agents get their own computers
summary: Cursor introduces agents that can test their own code and produce video proof of functionality, plus a cloud agent that manages PR workflows to merge-ready state. The demo shows agents with their own cloud environments that eliminate manual review bottlenecks in software development.
